listening.title: Listening: Hobbies survey
listening.transcript: I usually read books and listen to music in my free time. I love to travel, and I also like to play games.

questions.question: What does the speaker love to do?

listening.title: Listening: Review — A teacher's day
listening.transcript: I always wake up at six in the morning. I am a teacher, and I teach English in the afternoon. I rarely watch TV at night.

questions.question: Wake-up time: ___ in the morning
questions.explanation: "I always wake up at six in the morning."
